core_capabilities.name: Device Session
core_capabilities.description: Runs a hardware app session, keeps app context, emits screen/action payloads.

core_capabilities.name: Hardware App Manifest
core_capabilities.description: Declares app identity, device capabilities, adapters, screens, actions, models, and safety rules.

core_capabilities.name: Screen Payload Contract
core_capabilities.description: Defines display payloads that firmware or simulator screens can render.

core_capabilities.name: Hardware-Agnostic Input Events
core_capabilities.description: Represents buttons, joystick, touch, encoder, and other hardware interactions with optional semantic actions.

core_capabilities.name: Context Snapshot Contract
core_capabilities.description: Lets pages expose screen, cursor, selected item, visible rows, focused component, and page data to AI and deterministic routing.

core_capabilities.name: Generic Screen Contracts
core_capabilities.description: Declares custom page payload schemas, AI context schemas, and accepted app actions.

core_capabilities.name: Action Draft Contract
core_capabilities.description: Defines high-risk action drafts that require physical confirmation.

core_capabilities.name: HTTP Gateway
core_capabilities.description: Exposes health, manifest, boot, message, state, outbox, and OTA endpoints.

core_capabilities.name: WebSocket Gateway
core_capabilities.description: Runs DeviceKit sessions over WebSocket transport.

core_capabilities.name: Legacy Firmware Gateway
core_capabilities.description: Bridges existing firmware hello/listen/key_action frames into DeviceKit sessions.

core_capabilities.name: OTA Runtime
core_capabilities.description: Serves runtime WebSocket configuration and firmware update metadata.

core_capabilities.name: Firmware Runtime C Boundary
core_capabilities.description: Hardware-agnostic C API for network state, hello, listen, wake detect, and device state.

core_capabilities.name: Shared UI C Runtime
core_capabilities.description: Dispatches display JSON and key events to app/device screen vtables.

core_capabilities.name: Provider Registry
core_capabilities.description: Builds ASR, LLM, TTS, and voice fallback pipeline from runtime settings, including built-in aliases and custom provider classes.

core_capabilities.name: Admin API
core_capabilities.description: Exposes capabilities, sanitized runtime config, and active app manifests.

core_capabilities.name: Developer CLI
core_capabilities.description: Runs gateways, validates config, prints capabilities, and creates app templates.

core_capabilities.name: Audio Gateway
core_capabilities.description: Buffers firmware binary audio, decodes to PCM16 through AudioDecoder, and feeds ASR on listen stop.

core_capabilities.name: Market Stream Runtime
core_capabilities.description: Applies stream events to an app session without hardcoding a market data vendor.

core_capabilities.name: Reference App UI Package
core_capabilities.description: Ava Box product LVGL screens live outside DeviceKit core and consume shared screen payload contracts.

core_capabilities.name: Runtime Manager
core_capabilities.description: Keeps independent app sessions, outboxes, and event logs by device id.

core_capabilities.name: Admin And Device Auth
core_capabilities.description: Optional bearer-token protection using AVA_DEVICEKIT_ADMIN_TOKEN and AVA_DEVICEKIT_DEVICE_TOKEN.

core_capabilities.name: Board Port SDK Template
core_capabilities.description: C template for JSON transport, binary audio, display rendering, audio playback, buttons, and cursor context.

core_capabilities.name: Firmware Publish API
core_capabilities.description: Lists and publishes versioned firmware binaries for pull-based OTA updates.

core_capabilities.name: Developer Service Registry
core_capabilities.description: Declares server-side APIs such as proxy wallets, market data, payments, and custom app services without exposing credentials to devices.

core_capabilities.name: Single Process Runtime Server
core_capabilities.description: Runs HTTP, legacy WebSocket, runtime tasks, provider health, OTA, and admin APIs against one shared RuntimeManager.

core_capabilities.name: Device Protocol Spec
core_capabilities.description: Defines hello, ACK, display, TTS, input, context, command, and OTA-trigger frames for board ports.

core_capabilities.name: OTA Trigger Command
core_capabilities.description: Queues an `ota_check` device command so online hardware can run its normal OTA pull flow.

core_capabilities.name: Security Hardening
core_capabilities.description: Production mode, bearer-token requirements, and service invocation allowlist guidance.

core_capabilities.name: Device Identity
core_capabilities.description: Provisions devices, issues per-device bearer tokens, and defines the hook for device public keys, signed registration challenges, and optional on-chain device registries.

core_capabilities.name: Oracle Reward Claim Pattern
core_capabilities.description: Reference DePIN pattern where a device signs readings, an oracle verifies eligibility, and a Solana claim draft is physically confirmed on hardware.

core_capabilities.name: Solana Pay Transaction Request
core_capabilities.description: Payment terminal pattern for creating Solana Pay transaction requests, showing QR/payment summaries, and executing only after wallet or backend confirmation.

core_capabilities.name: Hardware Signer Reference
core_capabilities.description: Optional signer/approval app pattern for GET_PUBKEY, message review, physical confirmation, and signature-return flows without making signer custody the default app model.

core_capabilities.name: WSS + HTTP Fallback Transport
core_capabilities.description: Board-port pattern for persistent WebSocket, heartbeat, reconnect interval, and HTTP fallback when the realtime channel is unavailable.

core_capabilities.name: Secure Element Profile
core_capabilities.description: Optional hardware-security profile for devices with secure elements, device identity keys, protected signing, buzzer/LED feedback, and physical confirmation.

core_capabilities.name: Data Anchor Service
core_capabilities.description: Developer-service type for anchoring batches of sensor/proof/reward data to Solana-compatible data availability or blob-anchor services.

extension_points.description: Can be selected by runtime config with adapters.chain.provider/class/options.
Accepts PCM16 audio and returns transcript text. Built-ins include Qwen realtime and OpenAI-compatible transcription; custom Python classes can be selected in runtime config.
Converts response text to device-playable audio. Built-ins include mock, OpenAI-compatible speech, and AliBL CosyVoice WebSocket TTS; custom Python classes can be selected in runtime config.
Creates app-specific wallet/trade execution requests; selectable through execution.mode/class/options and not part of framework core.
Streams price/kline updates into app payloads.
Map a concrete ESP32 board to DeviceKit transport, input, audio, and display callbacks.
Map concrete hardware controls to generic InputEvent frames and optional app-level semantic actions.
Adds public-key, challenge-response, secure-element, or oracle-backed device identity without requiring user asset keys on ESP32.
Creates payment requests, QR payloads, wallet handoff links, and payment confirmation callbacks for physical payment terminals.
Verifies device submissions, signs reward eligibility, and returns claim/action drafts to hardware apps.
Receives telemetry via WSS or HTTP fallback, validates per-device auth, and fans out updates to dashboards, storage, or chain adapters.
